Phase-69.NAME: Referral Bonus Activation Correctness and Masked Invite Identity
Phase-69.purpose: Close referral bonus debt by proving and fixing the 7-day inviter reward for paid referrals, including pending activation for inviters without an active subscription and masked referred-email display in the user cabinet.

scope.in: Referral first-payment processing, 7-day bonus subscription/grant semantics, pending first-VPN activation for bonus-only inviters, active-subscription extension, idempotency, masked referred email in owner API/UI, backend tests, frontend referral history update, and MyGRACE synchronization.
scope.out: Live YooKassa credential setup, deploy/install scripts, public pricing changes, referral fraud scoring, admin referral redesign, raw referred email exposure, and payment provider replacement.

requirements.requirement-1: A paid referral must grant exactly 7 days to the referrer only after the referred user's first qualifying paid subscription/payment succeeds.
requirements.requirement-2: If the referrer already has an active non-pending subscription, the reward must extend the remaining subscription window by 7 days.
requirements.requirement-3: If the referrer has no active subscription, the reward must create a pending access grant whose 7-day timer starts only after the referrer's first VPN connection.
requirements.requirement-4: Duplicate payment webhooks or repeated process_first_payment calls must not grant the same referral bonus more than once.
requirements.requirement-5: Referral bonus semantics must not overwrite paid, complimentary, trial, expired, or pending-trial records destructively.
requirements.requirement-6: The user referral list must show a masked referred identity instead of "Реферал #N"; full emails must not be exposed unless a future admin-only contract explicitly allows it.
requirements.requirement-7: Existing Phase-28 verified-registration behavior must remain: unverified pending email registration cannot create referral linkage or bonus eligibility.

steps.step-1: Audit current ReferralService.process_first_payment, BillingService subscription lifecycle, pending activation fields, scheduler activation path, and referral tests.
steps.step-2: Selected migration-free data model: reuse subscriptions.pending_activation, trial_duration_days, and access_label for referral-bonus grants.
steps.step-3: Implemented active-subscription extension so the referrer's current access receives +7 days from the correct base without shortening access.
steps.step-4: Implemented no-active-subscription handling so a 7-day referral grant is pending until the referrer first connects through VPN.
steps.step-5: Reused first-handshake activation for pending referral bonus access with access_label-based user copy and scheduler/VPN stats compatibility.
steps.step-6: Hardened idempotency around bonus_given, minimum amount checks, duplicate processing, and pending bonus transfer into paid subscriptions.
steps.step-7: Returned masked referred email in /api/v1/referrals/list and updated frontend API types without returning raw email to the user cabinet.
steps.step-8: Updated Referrals UI so recent invitations render masked referred identity with compact mobile-safe rows and existing bonus status badges.
steps.step-9: Added tests for active extension, pending grant activation, duplicate webhook idempotency, scheduler activation, paid-subscription transfer, and masked identity; backend/frontend gates passed.

data-flow.flow-1: Invitee registers with referral code -> M-041 verifies email -> M-005 creates referral link exactly once.
data-flow.flow-2: Invitee payment succeeds -> M-004 webhook creates/extends invitee subscription -> M-005 processes first payment -> referrer receives 7-day extension or pending bonus grant.
data-flow.flow-3: Referrer with pending bonus connects via VPN -> M-003/M-008 observes first handshake -> M-063/M-004 activates the 7-day reward window.
data-flow.flow-4: User opens referrals page -> M-005 returns referral rows with masked referred identity -> M-009 renders compact "Реферал ..." history.

mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-1: Referrer has 12 days left, invitee pays: referrer expiry becomes 19 days left and duplicate webhook does not add another 7 days.
mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-2: Referrer has never bought a subscription, invitee pays: referrer receives pending 7-day access, then the 7 days start from the referrer's first VPN connection.
mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-3: Invitee registers but never verifies email or never pays: referral linkage/bonus remains absent or waiting according to existing verified-registration rules.

verification-design.gate-1: Backend referral tests must assert one-time bonus application and no duplicate extension from repeated webhooks.
verification-design.gate-2: Billing/trial tests must assert pending referral bonus activation starts from first VPN handshake and does not overwrite paid access.
verification-design.gate-3: Verified-registration tests must assert unverified registrations still create no referral side effects.
verification-design.gate-4: Frontend/API smoke must assert referral history uses masked email and never "Реферал #N" as the primary identity.
verification-design.gate-5: Redaction checks must fail if raw referred emails, payment IDs, tokens, VPN configs, or secrets are printed in smoke/log output.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_referrals.py tests/test_trial_activation.py tests/test_billing_service.py tests/test_scheduler.py -v
python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-69.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml
mygrace lint; git diff --check; protected deploy/install/runtime diff guard

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04: Phase-69 implemented referral-bonus active extension, pending first-VPN reward grants through access_label=referral-bonus, combined trial+bonus pending duration, pending bonus transfer into paid subscriptions, masked referred identity in /api/v1/referrals/list, compact Referrals UI rendering, and phase69 static smoke. Targeted backend tests passed 34/34; frontend build and Phase-69 smoke passed.

risk-assessment.risk-1: Current referral behavior appears to skip real access for referrers without active subscriptions; Phase-69 must close that without double-granting.
risk-assessment.risk-2: Webhook retries can duplicate subscription effects unless bonus processing stays idempotent.
risk-assessment.risk-3: Using normal trial fields for referral bonuses can confuse UI copy; implementation must label bonus access distinctly if needed.
risk-assessment.risk-4: Showing masked email improves usefulness but must not leak full referred-user identity in user-visible API responses or logs.

Phase-69.acceptance: Referral first-payment bonus reliably grants exactly 7 useful days to the inviter, either as active extension or first-VPN pending reward, and referral history shows masked referred identity with passing backend/frontend/MyGRACE verification.
